Applets for Music and Computers

Completed Applets - need to be installed!

3.3 Build a Sawtooth using Sine Waves
4.1 Noise "Bring in da funk"
4.4 Voice Formant synthesis
4.8 Granular Synthesis
4.9 Plucked String using Karplus Strong
5.1 MultiTap Delay
5.3 Using ITD to Locate a Sound

Installed Applets

1.1 Hear a Sine Wave - simple test of JSyn plugin.
1.2 Hear Amplitude - Non-pitched, red noise to demo pure amplitude. O- remove extraneous GUI from HearAmplitude O- remove scope and Hit nonsense
1.2 Amplitude Versus Decibels
1.3 Hear Frequency - Frequency (0-Nyquist) and amplitude on a sine wave with scope.
1.3 Ticks_Becoming a Steady Tone O- Enlarge Frequency display.
1.3 Stretched Octave - Perceptual Quiz
1.3 Transposition of a Melody - Multiplicative versus Additive transformation of a simple melody.
1.3 Fletcher-Munson Hearing Test
1.4 Draw a Waveform
2.4 Binary Counter with Beeping Bits O- did not stop sound in auto mode! Could not reproduce.
2.2 Sampled_Fader - to show quantization of a continuous signal.
2.3 Band-Limited Sawtooth and other oscillators - Use JSynExamples.TJ_SeeOsc
2.3 Sample Scrubber
2.6 Noisy Copy of a Melody - add controllable amount of noise each time to show degradation, show each copy when made, can play any of the copies.
3.2 Sampled_Phaser -  scribing a sinewave
3.3 Build a Sawtooth Using Sinewaves
3.3 FFT demo, graphics only, real-time update
4.2 Mix Sine Waves - change amplitudes, shows clipping.
4.2 Make a Waveform by Adding Harmonic Sine Wave Partials
4.3 Filter Fun, multiple sources (noise, waveforms),  SVF, biquad.
4.5 Low Frequency Modulation
4.6 WaveShaping using Formulae
4.6 WaveShaping using Chebyshev Polynomial Tables
4.7 FM Editor
5.1 DrumBox

 

Remaining Applets

>> Priority (1 lowest, 5 highest)

  • 4.2 Apply spectral envelopes to various partials to make different sounds. Attack/Release rates using exponential lags. (like UPIC in 5.7?) >>5
  • 4.3 Wind versus Helicopter example of modulating filter cutoff >>
  • 4.6 AM - low frequency tremolo, high frequency, no offset >>5
  • Simple FM tricks, two op, three op, feedback. >>5
  • 5.1 Musique Concrete Workstation - copy/paste piece as text. >>5
  • 5.2 Multi-tap delay with recirculation. Place taps. Set gain. >>3
  • Concrete editor. Reverse, cut and paste, loop. Chapter 1 techniques. Auto-zero-cross. Stretch. fade in/out. >>2
  • Tuning, select samples with harmonic or enharmonic partials(gender), select simple just-pentatonic, 12TET or slendro tuning. >>2
  • More Noise generators. White noise, feedback FM, fractal, >>4

    • Lower priority

    5.2 effects box fun >>2
    5.7  a color drawing applet organ. huh? >>2-3
    Some kind of algorithmic composition applet, stochastic, Markov? >>1 no chapter 6!

    O- change Happy Birthday to Mary had a Little Lamb >>5

    Larry says: . ALL THE STUFF BELOW IS FUN< BUT NOT AT ALL NECESSARY AT THIS POINT. A LOT OF IT IS HELD OVER FROM WHEN CHAPTER 6 EXISTED......DO THE ABOVE STUFF FIRST, and KEEP THIS LIST IN CASE WE HAVE SOME TIME ENERGY LEFT OVER.....

    Wrapper for Applet that detects.
    3.2 Triangle building using partials (priority #5)>>5
    4.2 Multi-waveform display>> 2
    4.2 Jamshed phantom fundamental illusion. Play specific tones. Then play phantom fundamental.>>1
    4.3 Comb filter over a looping voice sample.>2
    5.2 Effects box with ordered line of flange, etc.>>2
    5.3 Spatialization for headphones. ITD, filtering.>>1
    5.3 HemiSync>> if i knew what it was, i'm sure i would want it very badly
    5.4 Vocoder (if audio input working)>>1
    5.7 Stupid graphic/sound thingie.>1
    5.7 UPIC>1
    6.2 Markov, text grid>1
    6.2 Composition fun kit>1
    6.3 Simple N track sequencer, select instrument, record/solo/mute, play, stop (may be too dopey) LOW PRIORITY>1
    6.4 stochastic generator, start with evenly distributed pitch and event triggers, add constraints for scale, timing, etc.
    6.4 Tenney atonal melody generator. When a pitch is selected, its probability is set to 0.0. It then creeps back up to 1.0. Show probabilities as bar graph. Toggle to setting to 3.0 instead of 0.0.
    6.4 Stochastic based on musical rules, Major scales, start and end on C, etc.
    6.5 L-Grammar. User enters string AEBEGC =>.... LOW PRIORITY
    6.6 "Sonify" PI, sonify bio data or stock, or weather data
    Crossfade between waveforms to show timbre.>2
    Reverb. Toggle direct/early-echo/reverb. Various networks.
    Spectral display with freq/amp vertical bars. Create bar with mouse click. Drag bars. Delete. (What is the purpose of creating and dragging bars?)
    Basilar membrane animation showing excitation of hairs for 3 sine waves.
    Parameter morphing. A-B
    Some kind of fractal generator.
    Time domain replacement, queue from A or B.
    Nancarrow piano roll.
    Envelope follower to show amplitude of an input signal.
     

    Applets that Require JSyn Mods

  • Harmonic shift or spread in additive synthesis for aperiodic waveforms.
  • Real-time FFT/IFFT, show tradefoffs for time/frequency resolution for a drum track versus big chord.
  • ITD a sound with variable delay until they break apart. (need fractional delay)
  • FFT, filter drawing,
  • Effects box. Phase/flanger/chorus/echo. Use microphone?
  • Violin model theremin.

    • Composition

  • Markov
  • Baroque generator
  • 12 tone rows

    • Fix

  • Amplitude+Frequency of sine wave - add a couple of hot buttons in the AMPLITUDE/FREQUENCY applet, to lock to some common frequences (440 (Middle A), 256 (Tuning Fork), 60 (wall frequency).

    • Text to Write

    Averaging filter discussion

    Video Game Synthesis

    Sega Geneisis had FM
    What machines had what hardware.
